hero.badge: The Future of Travel and Business Trips is Here
hero.description: Forget endless chats, Excel files, and manual bookings. SplitPlan plans trips, splits expenses, and manages business travel automatically.
hero.createSoloMessage: What do you want to call your adventure?
hero.createGroupMessage: What name shall we give to this trip?

painPoints.title: NO MORE ORGANIZATIONAL CHAOS
painPoints.subtitle: Organizing a trip shouldn't be a second job. Whether it's friends or a corporate team.
painPoints.chaosDesc: Endless WhatsApp chats, lost links, and no one making a decision. It happens in groups of friends... and in business teams under pressure.
painPoints.fragmentationDesc: 5 different apps open. For companies, travel policies, approvals, and budgets must be respected.
painPoints.financeDesc: Chasing friends for money is the worst part. For companies, it becomes an accounting and reporting issue.

solution.title: 4 PHASES FOR THE PERFECT TRIP
solution.subtitle: Our AI manages preferences, logistics, budget, and reports. Works for vacations and business trips.

s1.title: Decision & Consensus
s1.desc: AI gathers everyone's tastes and proposes 3 perfect options. For corporate teams, it also accounts for policies and approved budget limits.

s2.title: Proactive Logistics
s2.desc: Flights and hotels booked in sync with the budget. For companies, we automate approvals and team travel preferences.

s3.title: Dynamic Itinerary
s3.desc: Smart planning, geographically optimized. Perfect for groups and teams that need to adhere to meetings and schedules.

s4.title: Trip CFO
s4.desc: Tracks expenses in real-time, calculates settlements, and generates accounting-ready reports.

features.mediator_desc: We aren't just a search engine. We are the friend who makes everyone agree and the virtual colleague who aligns the team on travel decisions.
features.endtoend_desc: From "Where should we go?" to "What a photo!". And for companies, from trip approval to the final receipt.
features.finance_desc: Splitwise only does math. We integrate payments and for corporate teams, we generate accounting-ready reports.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.pro_monthly_desc: For those who want total control.
pricing.business_cta: ARE YOU A COMPANY? REQUEST A DEMO →

dashboard.title: Trip Dashboard
dashboard.unlockDesc: Unleash full potential: Optimized itinerary, automatic logistics, unlimited AI chat and more.
dashboard.confirmCompleteDesc: Do you want to mark this trip as completed? It will be moved to your history archive.
dashboard.tripCompleted: Trip completed! You can find it in your archive.

guestCta.title: Plan your next trip
guestCta.desc: Login or Register to unlock the full itinerary, budget management, and AI chat.

dashboard.consensusDesc: Great news! The group has chosen {{destination}} as the official destination. The organizer is now finalizing logistics and hotel details to generate the final itinerary.
dashboard.generatingDesc: Our AI is optimizing rhythms and stops for your group's unique preferences.
dashboard.confirmResetLogisticsDesc: Do you really want to reset logistics? The current itinerary will be deleted and will need to be regenerated after entering new hotel data.

logistics.title: Logistics & Bookings
logistics.subtitle: Ready-to-book links, without going crazy.
logistics.trainsDesc: Book your train ticket from {{origin}} to {{destination}}.
logistics.carDesc: We think you'll use your car for this trip to {{destination}}.
logistics.carBudget: We included fuel and toll estimates in your Budget.
logistics.flightsDesc: Search direct flights from {{origin}} to {{destination}} for {{count}} people.

survey.title: Defining Details
survey.subtitle: Help us build the perfect trip for {{target}}.
survey.step0Title: What is the purpose of the trip?
survey.step0Desc: This will help us personalize the perfect itinerary for you.
survey.step1Title: What is your mode of transport?
survey.step1Desc: Choose how you want to reach your destination.
survey.namesWarningDesc: Enter the NAMES your friends used (or will use) to register on SplitPlan. This will allow them to vote on the destination from their account!
survey.workDaysQuestion: Which days will you be working?
survey.workAiNote: The AI will organize extra activities only on non-working days or outside the indicated hours.
survey.mustAvoidLabel: What would you like to avoid?

finance.title: Expense Management
finance.tipDesc: Balances are automatically calculated by dividing each expense equally among all trip participants.
finance.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this expense?

photos.title: Trip Photos
photos.subtitle: Capture and share the best moments with your group.
photos.emptyDesc: There are no photos yet. Be the first to upload one!
photos.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this photo? This action is irreversible.

voting.groupConsensus: The group needs to reach consensus. ({{count}}/{{total}} votes)
voting.organizerTip: Organizer: Send the link below to your friends. When they join, the system will recognize them by name and let them vote!
voting.greeting: Hi {{name}}, you are voting for yourself
voting.votedDesc:
Thank you for casting your vote.

The organizer must now finish planning the trip.
Once complete, ask them for the read-only link to see the final itinerary.

toast.shareSuccess: 🔗 Voting link copied! Send it to your friends.

voting.shareTitle: Vote for our destination on SplitPlan!
voting.shareText: Hey! Our trip to {{destination}} is ready. Join, register with your name and vote for your favorite destination!

budget.title: Budget Analysis
budget.noExpenses: No expenses recorded yet to show the chart.
budget.usageLow: Great job, the budget is still well under control.
budget.usageMid: You're at half the budget. Manage next expenses well!
budget.usageHigh: Warning! You have almost exhausted the set budget.
budget.aiSimulationDesc: Want to know how much you'll spend in {{destination}}? Our AI calculates the local cost of living for you.

chatbot.hint: You can ask to add, edit, or delete activities in the itinerary.
chatbot.placeholder: e.g., 'Add a dinner tonight at 8 PM'
chatbot.error: Sorry, an error occurred while processing your request.

hotelConfirm.title: Step 2: Logistics Confirmation
hotelConfirm.subtitle:
Book {{mode}} from the links above, then enter details here.
AI will create the itinerary based on your arrival time and location.
hotelConfirm.addressPlaceholder: e.g., Via dei Fori Imperiali, Rome

toast.success: Data extracted successfully! Check the fields.

app.errorTitle: Oops! The site encountered a critical problem
app.offlineBanner: Offline Mode - You are viewing saved data

business.title: For Business
business.subheadline: Join companies that have optimized their logistics with SplitPlan.
business.trust_note: Enterprise solutions: integrations, policies, and reporting.
business.demo_note: A DEDICATED ACCOUNT MANAGER WILL CONTACT YOU FOR A PERSONALIZED DEMO.
business.privacy_disclaimer: BY CLICKING "BOOK A FREE DEMO" YOU ACCEPT OUR PRIVACY POLICY AND CONSENT TO BE CONTACTED FOR COMMERCIAL PURPOSES.
business.bullet1_desc: Set budget limits and approved expense categories for every team.
business.bullet2_desc: Overview of all active trips, real-time costs, and team roadmap.
business.bullet3_desc: Export detailed, accounting-ready reports with a single click.

demo.success_toast: Request submitted! We'll contact you shortly.
demo.title: Configure your Business Account
demo.subtitle: Talk to an expert to scale your company's travel management.

footer.tagline: We make group trips easy, fun, and stress-free.

roi.title: How much does it cost NOT to use SplitPlan?
roi.assumption: *Estimate based on an average recovery of 2 hours (research, booking, expensing, and approval) for each single trip.
